items.title: [负面] Game was great until recently update 2.5.0 dropped...
items.summary:
Game was great until recently update 2.5.0 dropped causing concern for the playerbase where a pattern has been noticed over time.

This game is heavily dupe reliant and this update caused a lot of backlash. 
Backlash aside, why this is important is because the dev backpedaled and apologised...prior to this there was another outrage that cause the dev to YET AGAIN to backpedal and apologise. This happened another time BEFORE THIS recent event and the previous one(mentioned in last sentence) which a pattern is formed at this point.

I'm not supporting devs that are trying to harvest playerbase goodwill of that they actually listen to feedback through trial and error incompetence to push for heavier monetization.

Game already lack a big playerbase and this act from developers is a big nono for future to come.

Take this review into your consideration if you are playing the game for the longhaul.

items.title:
[正面] Gacha Elements:
Very unique gacha game, spent my e...
items.summary:
Gacha Elements:
Very unique gacha game, spent my entire vacation playing this. You obtain so many pulls from just playing, I have never experienced such a generous gacha game ever! I've been playing Honkai for over a year and I think I have around 127 pulls on the standard banner, I'm 60 hours deep into this game and I've pulled over 500 times on the banner already. I have every standard banner non-limited character except for two and from what I've seen most characters are completely playable in any content as long as you have good team composition.
Story & Presentation:
I love eldtrich horror and this game completely nails that aesthetic, the story had me tearing up in almost every chapter so far and the stuff that happens is so messed up. I've gotten the chance to do some of the Deepdives and every character story I've experienced through it has been unique so far. There are a few moments of comedy and I've genuinely laughed out loud in a lot of moments. Looking forward to experiencing Chapter 6 and beyond!
Gameplay:
Slay The Spire on crack, so addicting, team combinations seem endless and each realm having their own mechanics and being able to mix any two into a team allows you to experiment and really find your playstyle.
Music:
Wasn't really expecting much in this department but some of the songs that play, especially in sad moments is really good.
Negatives:
Takes a while to obtain level up items after a certain point and because of it I've had to go in to just do my dailies until I can save up enough to level up my characters so they can tackle the next chapter of the story and harder content in general. So having the itch to play but not being able to progress anytime soon is kinda frustrating.
Overall Thoughts:
This game is amazing, I saw it almost shut down at one point towards the end of Act 1 of the story but I'm so glad it didn't, this has turned into my second active gacha game I will be keeping up with behind Honkai and I'm looking forward to the 2.5 anniversary update and everything after! If you like gacha games, want to stay a f2p player, love games like Slay The Spire and anything eldtrich horror and Cthulhu mythos related then you'll have a blast with this game!

items.title: [正面] Woow, les dessins, le gameplay, l'ambiance, tout y...
items.summary: Woow, les dessins, le gameplay, l'ambiance, tout y est. c'est vraiment dommage que la traduction française soit horrible, on a vraiment envie de suivre l'histoire mais c'est presque impossible avec cette traduction, j'espère que la future mise à jour sera faite à ce niveau car c'est vraiment un banger niveau deckbulding, l'histoire a l'air super glauque et prenante

items.title: [正面] Pro-tip:  Don't waste any silver till you know the...
items.summary:
Pro-tip:  Don't waste any silver till you know the game better.   Don't use it on ANYTHING.  This is the most important thing about starting this game.   You will ruin your start!   

Let's get into it.

Start was generous?  Not sure how Gacha game are these days, but you can unlimitedly re-roll the initial heros so you can get a good hero.   What is a good hero?  No way to know at the start.  I tried to google tier lists, or something...  But it's dated?  Maybe?

Gameplay:  Card based combat game is pretty good.  I like the rogue-like combat.  It looks and feels complex, so learning the game mechanics was fun.  Relics, Curses, debuffs, card draw, energy usage, and even more mechanics to learn.   The look and feel of the game is fantastic!  

Semi-Pro-tip:  Don't mix and match factions at the start!   

A problem I faced was the names of stuff.  Factions were named, but the heros only showed icons. So... Which factions am I suppose to used?  I didn't know which was which in-game.   So every decision was with looking at a google doc somebody rando made...  How accurate is it?  No idea since I didn't get to the end game yet.

Amateur-Tip:  The recommend suggestion is...  not the best?   There is no chat that I saw, so you have nobody to ask about it.   So...  Google doc it I guess?   

After a week playing, and hit the lvl 50 wall...  Everything was pretty easy till then...  Then you realize how deep you'll need to invest in heros to get them decent.   And that all the heros you worked so hard on...  are just bad.   I burnt all my silver... and now I feel stuck at lvl 7?   I over invested in bad heros, my rolls didn't get enough of the top tier heros.  The ones I did get doesn't mesh with the heros Ive been lvling up.  

Conclusion?  

Try the game!  Try your luck!  It's great!   Hope your luck is better than mine!  But after 2 weeks... and a bunch of hours...  I think I'm done.  Honestly, that's good for a game.  Just the next wall...  is just waiting on daily refreshes to get more mats, and hoping on drawing better heros.   Time to try something else.
